name: Salmon- Long Grain Risotto
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Fresh basil leaves, minced (1 tablespoon dried)
6 ounces Canned salmon, flaked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, bring 4 cups of water to a boil.
2. Reduce heat and simmer.
3. Place a large saucepan over medium heat for 30 seconds, then add olive oil and heat for an additional 30 seconds.
4. Add onions; sauté until translucent (about 5 minutes).
5. Add rice; stir to coat.
6. Gradually add 1 cup of hot water and salt, stirring constantly.
7. Cover and simmer over low heat for 5 minutes.
8. Add another half cup of water. Cook, stirring constantly, until all the liquid is absorbed.
9. Continue adding water, about half a cup at a time, making sure all the liquid is absorbed between each addition, until the rice is just tender.
10. Stir in lemon zest, lemon juice, basil, and scallion.
11. Add flaked salmon; stir gently and serve.
This recipe serves 1 1/4 cups.
